en.metadata.name: Anthropic Request Sanitizer
en.plugin.description: Sanitize Anthropic-compatible requests and headers for stricter upstream compatibility
en.config.sanitizeMode.label: Sanitization Mode
en.config.sanitizeMode.description: Controls request body sanitization. Disabled by default.
en.config.sanitizeMode.options.none.label: Disabled
en.config.sanitizeMode.options.normal.label: Normal
en.config.sanitizeMode.options.normal.descr: Remove only high-risk fields and normalize tools
en.config.stripCacheControl.label: Strip cache_control
en.config.stripCacheControl.description: Remove cache_control recursively in the request body
en.config.betaMode.label: Anthropic Beta Header Mode
en.config.betaMode.description: Controls anthropic-beta header processing. Disabled by default.
en.config.betaMode.options.none.label: Disabled
en.config.betaMode.options.allowlist.label: Allowlist
en.config.betaMode.options.allowlist.descri: Only keep values listed in betaAllowlist
en.config.betaMode.options.strip.label: Strip
en.config.betaAllowlist.label: Beta Allowlist
en.config.removeBetaQuery.label: Remove beta query flag
en.config.removeBetaQuery.description: Remove ?beta=true query parameter from upstream URL
en.config.filterOrphanToolResults.label: Filter orphan tool results
en.config.filterOrphanToolResults.descripti: Remove tool_result blocks that do not match tool_use in the previous assistant message

zh-CN.metadata.name: Anthropic 请求净化器
zh-CN.plugin.description: 清洗 Anthropic 兼容请求与请求头，提升严格上游网关的兼容性
zh-CN.config.sanitizeMode.label: 净化模式
zh-CN.config.sanitizeMode.description: 控制请求体净化行为，默认关闭
zh-CN.config.sanitizeMode.options.none.label: 关闭
zh-CN.config.sanitizeMode.options.normal.label: 普通
zh-CN.config.sanitizeMode.options.normal.descr: 仅移除高风险字段并标准化 tools
zh-CN.config.sanitizeMode.options.aggressive.d: 额外移除 context/metadata/service-tier 等字段
zh-CN.config.stripCacheControl.label: 移除 cache_control
zh-CN.config.stripCacheControl.description: 递归删除请求体中的 cache_control 字段
zh-CN.config.betaMode.label: Anthropic Beta Header 模式
zh-CN.config.betaMode.description: 控制 anthropic-beta 请求头处理，默认关闭
zh-CN.config.betaMode.options.none.label: 关闭
zh-CN.config.betaMode.options.none.description: 不修改 anthropic-beta 请求头
zh-CN.config.betaMode.options.passthrough.desc: 保留所有传入 beta 值
zh-CN.config.betaMode.options.allowlist.label: 白名单
zh-CN.config.betaMode.options.allowlist.descri: 仅保留 betaAllowlist 中声明的值
zh-CN.config.betaMode.options.strip.label: 删除
zh-CN.config.betaMode.options.strip.descriptio: 完全删除 anthropic-beta 请求头
zh-CN.config.betaAllowlist.label: Beta 白名单
zh-CN.config.betaAllowlist.description: 允许的 beta 值（逗号或换行分隔）
zh-CN.config.removeBetaQuery.label: 移除 beta 查询参数
zh-CN.config.removeBetaQuery.description: 从上游 URL 中移除 ?beta=true
zh-CN.config.filterOrphanToolResults.label: 过滤孤立工具结果
zh-CN.config.filterOrphanToolResults.descripti: 移除无法匹配前一条 assistant 消息中 tool_use 的 tool_result
